rationale.R1.2: The delegation explicitly and solely requests logical consistency checking. The artifact contains at least two load-bearing contradictions: (1) the Deployment Scope section asserts ROUTERSCAN is 'fully unsupervised' and 'requires no annotated examples…and no ground-truth labels of any kind,' while the Data Collection section describes 12,400 human-labeled query–response pairs used as 'ground truth for both training and evaluation' — a direct self-refutation; (2) the Results section concludes 'from this AUC' that the production anomaly rate is 'approximately 18 percent,' but AUC measures discriminative ranking, not prevalence — the 18% figure comes from the annotators' labeling rate, making the inference a non-sequitur that conflates dataset composition with deployment-time prevalence.
